# YET ANOTHER CLOUD SERVICE - YACS - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
YET ANOTHER CLOUD SERVICE or just YACS is a cloud service where the user cand deploy their web pages.
The interaction with the service for is done

## Project Structure
- **yacs-tui**: tui app to interact with YACS, focused to be able to deploy projects
- **yacs-fe**: web app to interact with YACS, focused on management of the user projects, calls the yacs-be,
- **yacs-api**: the api that the fe and the tui interacts with
- **test-yacs-project-to-deploy**: just a test vite project to test the deployment, used by yacs-tui
